---
title: "Project Structure"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include ../../_includes/pages-nav.qmd >}}

Codebase metrics, file organization, and repository health.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Codebase

```{r codebase-metrics}
safe_tar_read("vig_codebase_metrics", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

## File Counts

```{r file-counts}
safe_tar_read("vig_file_counts_table", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

## GitHub Stats

```{r github-stats}
safe_tar_read("vig_github_stats_table", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

:::
